title: Marketplace quickstart
excerpt: > You can customize this guide by selecting integration options in the [Interactive platform guide](https://docs.stripe.com/connect/interactive-platform-guide.md). Use this working code sample to integrate Stripe Hosted Checkout for one-time payments with Stripe Connect.
